sentences.target: Meine Stimme ist heute ein bisschen heiser.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃtɪmə ɪst ˈhɔʏ̯tə aɪ̯n ˈbɪsçn̩ ˈhaɪ̯zɐ/

translations.de: Meine Stimme ist heute ein bisschen heiser.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃtɪmə ɪst ˈhɔʏ̯tə aɪ̯n ˈbɪsçn̩ ˈhaɪ̯zɐ/
translations.en: My voice is a bit hoarse today.
translations.es: Hoy tengo la voz un poco ronca.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, j'ai la voix un peu rauque.
translations.it: Oggi ho la voce un po' rauca.
translations.ru: Сегодня у меня голос немного осип.
translations.pt: Hoje estou com a voz um pouco rouca.
translations.vi: Hôm nay giọng tôi hơi khàn.
translations.nl: Mijn stem is vandaag een beetje schor.
translations.uk: Сьогодні в мене трохи осів голос.
translations.hi: आज मेरी आवाज़ थोड़ी बैठ गई है.
translations.el: Σήμερα η φωνή μου είναι λίγο βραχνή.
translations.nb: I dag er stemmen min litt hes.
translations.id: Hari ini suara saya agak serak.
translations.sv: Idag är min röst lite hes.
translations.ro: Astăzi vocea mea e puțin răgușită.
translations.da: I dag er min stemme lidt hæs.
translations.ja: 今日は声が少しかすれています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; feminine singular nominative; modifies 'Stimme' and marks the possessor, agreeing in gender/number/case.
Feminine noun; nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Copula auxiliary; 3rd person singular present indicative; links subject 'Stimme' to the predicate adjective 'heiser'.
Temporal adverb; situates the event in time; modifies the clause.
Indefinite article forming the fixed quantifier phrase 'ein bisschen'; part of a degree modifier.
Degree adverb; together with 'ein' forms 'ein bisschen' ('a little'); modifies the predicate adjective 'heiser'.
Predicate adjective in positive degree; complements the copula 'ist' and describes the subject.

sentences.target: Er senkt die Stimme im Zug.

translations.de: Er senkt die Stimme im Zug.
translations.en: He lowers his voice on the train.
translations.es: En el tren habla en voz baja.
translations.fr: Dans le train, il parle à voix basse.
translations.it: Sul treno parla a bassa voce.
translations.yue: 佢喺火車上面會細聲講嘢。
translations.pt: No trem, ele fala mais baixo.
translations.vi: Trên tàu, anh ấy nói nhỏ.
translations.nl: In de trein praat hij zachter.
translations.hi: ट्रेन में वह धीमी आवाज़ में बात करता है.
translations.ro: În tren, el vorbește mai încet.
translations.ja: 電車の中では彼は小声で話します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative singular, 3rd person; subject of the clause.
Main lexical verb; 3rd person singular present indicative; transitive, selecting 'die Stimme' as direct object.
Definite article; feminine singular accusative; determines 'Stimme' as the direct object.
Feminine noun; accusative singular; direct object of 'senkt'.
Preposition (contracted 'in dem'); governs dative; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Masculine noun; dative singular as object of 'im'; indicates location.

sentences.target: Ich höre deine Stimme durch die Wand.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhøːʁə ˈdaɪ̯nə ˈʃtɪmə dʊʁç diː vant/

translations.de: Ich höre deine Stimme durch die Wand.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhøːʁə ˈdaɪ̯nə ˈʃtɪmə dʊʁç diː vant/
translations.en: I hear your voice through the wall.
translations.es: Escucho tu voz a través de la pared.
translations.fr: J'entends ta voix à travers le mur.
translations.it: Sento la tua voce attraverso il muro.
translations.zh-Hans: 隔着墙能听到你的声音。
translations.ru: Я слышу твой голос сквозь стену.
translations.pt: Ouço sua voz através da parede.
translations.he: אני שומע את הקול שלך דרך הקיר.
translations.vi: Tôi nghe giọng bạn qua bức tường.
translations.nl: Ik hoor je stem door de muur.
translations.uk: Я чую твій голос крізь стіну.
translations.hu: Hallom a hangodat a falon keresztül.
translations.hi: मैं दीवार के पार तुम्हारी आवाज़ सुनता हूँ.
translations.el: Ακούω τη φωνή σου μέσα από τον τοίχο.
translations.nb: Jeg hører stemmen din gjennom veggen.
translations.sv: Jag hör din röst genom väggen.
translations.da: Jeg hører din stemme gennem væggen.
translations.ja: 壁越しにあなたの声が聞こえます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative singular, 1st person; subject of the clause.
Main verb; 1st person singular present indicative; transitive, taking 'deine Stimme' as direct object.
Possessive determiner; feminine singular accusative; modifies 'Stimme'; indicates 2nd person singular possessor.
Feminine noun; accusative singular; direct object of 'höre'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a prepositional phrase of path/location.
Definite article; feminine singular accusative; determines 'Wand' as the object of 'durch'.
Feminine noun; accusative singular; object of the preposition 'durch'.

sentences.target: Sie hat eine tiefe Stimme am Telefon.
sentences.reading: /ziː hat ˈaɪ̯nə ˈtiːfə ˈʃtɪmə am teːleˈfoːn/

translations.de: Sie hat eine tiefe Stimme am Telefon.
translations.ipa: /ziː hat ˈaɪ̯nə ˈtiːfə ˈʃtɪmə am teːleˈfoːn/
translations.en: She has a deep voice on the phone.
translations.es: Por teléfono, su voz suena grave.
translations.fr: Au téléphone, sa voix est grave.
translations.it: Al telefono ha la voce bassa.
translations.zh-Hans: 她在电话里声音很低沉。
translations.yue: 佢喺電話入面把聲好低沉。
translations.ru: По телефону у неё низкий голос.
translations.pt: Ao telefone, a voz dela é grave.
translations.vi: Qua điện thoại, giọng cô ấy nghe trầm.
translations.nl: Aan de telefoon klinkt haar stem laag.
translations.uk: По телефону в неї низький голос.
translations.hi: फ़ोन पर उसकी आवाज़ भारी लगती है.
translations.el: Στο τηλέφωνο η φωνή της είναι βαθιά.
translations.nb: På telefon er stemmen hennes dyp.
translations.sv: I telefonen är hennes röst mörk.
translations.ro: La telefon, vocea ei e gravă.
translations.da: I telefonen er hendes stemme dyb.
translations.ja: 電話だと彼女の声は低く聞こえます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative singular, 3rd person feminine; subject of the clause.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present indicative; transitive, taking 'eine tiefe Stimme' as object.
Indefinite article; feminine singular accusative; determines 'Stimme' as direct object.
Attributive adjective; inflected for feminine singular accusative to agree with 'Stimme'; modifies the noun.
Feminine noun; accusative singular; direct object of 'hat'.
Preposition (contracted 'an dem'); governs dative; introduces a locative/manner prepositional phrase.
Neuter noun; dative singular; object of 'am'; PP indicates medium/context ('on the phone').
